prompt: Create a page showing all of a customer's active UW services — energy, broadband, and mobile. Each service should show the monthly cost and have a link to manage it. Show a total monthly spend at the top. It needs to work on mobile and desktop.

assertions.name: no-raw-html-layout
assertions.description: Layout uses Flex, Grid, Container, or Box from hearth-react. No raw <div> used as structural containers.

assertions.name: uses-hearth-cards
assertions.description: Card (or CardActionLink/CardContent sub-components) from hearth-react is used for each service.

assertions.name: uses-hearth-typography
assertions.description:
Heading, BodyText, or DetailText from hearth-react used for all text. No raw

-

or

.

assertions.name: responsive-props
assertions.description: Responsive object notation used on at least one prop (e.g. direction={{ mobile: 'column', desktop: 'row' }} or gridColumnSpan={{ mobile: 'full', desktop: '4' }}) to handle mobile vs desktop layout.

assertions.name: total-spend-displayed
assertions.description: Total monthly spend is calculated from the services and displayed prominently, using an appropriate Hearth typography component.

assertions.name: uses-hearth-links
assertions.description: Each service's manage link uses Link, CardActionLink, or CardInteraction from hearth-react. No raw <a> tags.

assertions.name: test-file-exists
assertions.description: A ServicesDashboard.test.tsx file is present and contains at least one test.
